pageTitle: Geometriya — digital out-of-home network operator, Bishkek
metaDescription: Geometriya is a digital out-of-home (DOOH) network operator in Bishkek. Outdoor and indoor displays, precise time slots, transparent reporting.
heroSub: Geometriya builds a legal, managed digital out-of-home infrastructure in Bishkek — outdoor and indoor displays, precise time slots, transparent reporting.
aboutLead: Geometriya is a digital out-of-home (DOOH) network operator in Bishkek. We build legal, managed infrastructure: outdoor and indoor displays, technology-managed placement, and transparent reporting for clients.
p1Text: Every display, location, and contract has a confirmed legal basis.
p2Text: Placement is confirmed by the broadcast schedule and actual playback evidence, not by word of mouth.
p3Text: Management and client data live in systems, not verbal agreements.
plansLead: Geometriya expands in stages: from individual placements to systemic city coverage, followed by format growth and, conditions permitting, expansion beyond Bishkek. Each stage is validated by network manageability and inventory economics, not by declaration.
phase1Text: Operating system for the network, first contracts, process refinement.
phase2Text: Scaling sales and coverage, expanding placement formats.
phase3Text: A stable position in Kyrgyzstan's digital out-of-home advertising market.
contactSub: We respond to ad placement and partnership inquiries.
ctaText: Want to place ads or discuss a partnership? Write to us — we'll reply shortly.
